name: serve-app
description: Start a Gunicorn web app server in background with env config, replacing cd + export + nohup gunicorn + sleep patterns.

parameters.name: --config
parameters.description: Path to env config file (relative to workdir)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + export + nohup gunicorn + sleep + health check into one step, saving 3-4 agent steps per server start.
